creator: robin.hahling@gw-computing.net
text:
Created attachment 149506
Patch for sbin/camcontrol/camcontrol.c file.

Revisions 260059 and 260087 added "-b" flag to camcontrol(8) devlist. The camcontrol manual page has been updated accordingly but the usage() function has been forgotten.

Attached is a patch that fixes this omission.

It affects 11.0-CURRENT as well as 10.1-RELEASE and 10.1-STABLE since these commit have been MFC'd to 10.1.
